description: As part of join work between Atlas Axis and Core Facilitator teams, this pull request migrates the Atlas from HTML to Markdown. This allows us to express the full hierarchical structure of the Atlas and will support future automations and AI integrations that are under development.

diff: If the Core Facilitator find that an AD has conducted a misaligned act warranting financial penalties or derecognition, such penalties may be deducted from the AD’s Buffer. The amount deducted is used as a whistleblower bounty to compensate any individual/entity who responsibly provided useful data, information or evidence that was helpful to the Facilitators’ adjudication.
The whistleblower bounty is subject to the restrictions specified in
- AD Buffer Used For Whistleblower Bounties
Any remaining funds in the AD’s Buffer should be paid out to the derecognized Aligned Delegate.
description: Do not merge unless associated poll passes

diff: If the Core Facilitator find that an AD has conducted a misaligned act warranting financial penalties or derecognition, such penalties may be deducted from the AD’s Buffer. The amount deducted is used as a whistleblower bounty to compensate any individual/entity who responsibly provided useful data, information or evidence that was helpful to the Facilitators’ adjudication.
The whistleblower bounty is subject to the restrictions specified in ##### A.1.5.4.4.3 - AD Buffer Used For Whistleblower Bounties.
Any remaining funds in the AD’s Buffer should be paid out to the derecognized Aligned Delegate.
